code: import axios from"axios";const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE||"http://localhost:8000";const api=axios.create({baseURL:"".concat(API_BASE,"/api")});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("access_token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export default api;
